Details:
* This JSON list contains all parameters required to set up NFS.
* The default value for the ``nfs_name``  is the ``nfs_storage_default``. Type: string.
* See the following parameters: 

    * Server_ip—Provide the IP of the NFS server which is accessible to all the diskful and diskless nodes.
    * Server_share_path—Provide server share path of the NFS Server.
    * Client_share_path—Path where nfs server contents needs to be mounted. The default value is /opt/omnia.
   
* See the following sample::

          nfs_client_params:
                {
                      nfs_name: "nfs_storage_default"
                      server_ip: "", # Provide the IP of the NFS server
                      server_share_path: "", # Provide server share path of the NFS Server
                      client_share_path: /opt/omnia,
                      client_mount_options: "nosuid,rw,sync,hard,intr",
               }
